key_features: File-type specific overrides for JSON, YAML, Prisma, EJS, and Makefile
file_insights.significance: Ensures consistent formatting across different editors and IDEs

key_features: Extends recommended configs for ESLint, TypeScript, and import plugins
Strict type safety rules (explicit return types, no any, no floating promises)
Unused variable patterns allow underscore prefix
file_insights.significance: Enforces code quality and consistency across the TypeScript codebase

key_features: Arrow function parentheses avoided when possible
file_insights.significance: Provides automated code formatting to maintain consistent style

patterns_discovered.description: Three layers of formatting/linting configuration (EditorConfig, ESLint, Prettier) working in concert
patterns_discovered.implication: Ensures consistency at editor level, linting level, and formatting level

patterns_discovered.description: ESLint configured with TypeScript parser and type-checking plugins
patterns_discovered.implication: Project prioritizes type safety and modern TypeScript practices

patterns_discovered.description: Multiple rules enforcing explicit types, no implicit any, proper async/await handling
patterns_discovered.implication: Focus on maintainability and preventing runtime errors

patterns_discovered.description: EditorConfig and ESLint include overrides for specific file types and test files
patterns_discovered.implication: Acknowledges different requirements for different file types and test contexts

gotchas_discovered.description: .editorconfig disables trim_trailing_whitespace for .md files to preserve line breaks
gotchas_discovered.risk: Developers unfamiliar with this exception might attempt to normalize whitespace in markdown

gotchas_discovered.description: .editorconfig overrides space indentation for Makefiles (required by Make specification)
gotchas_discovered.risk: Accidental conversion to spaces will break Makefile functionality

gotchas_discovered.description: ESLint rules prevent floating promises and require proper await handling
gotchas_discovered.risk: Common async pattern violations will be caught; requires discipline in async code

gotchas_discovered.description: import/order rule has specific grouping and alphabetization requirements
gotchas_discovered.risk: Imports must follow strict rules or linting will fail; auto-fixing may be needed

gotchas_discovered.description: ESLint overrides relax type checking rules in test files (.spec.ts, .test.ts, __tests__)
gotchas_discovered.risk: Developers may rely on lenient testing rules and accidentally introduce them to production code

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created three foundational configuration files that establish project-wide code quality, formatting, and linting standards
approach_outcome.completeness: All three primary configuration files created with comprehensive rules and overrides
approach_outcome.quality: Configurations demonstrate professional-grade setup with attention to TypeScript best practices, file-type specific handling, and test context awareness

recommendations.recommendation: Create pre-commit hooks (husky) to run ESLint and Prettier automatically before commits
recommendations.rationale: Prevents non-compliant code from being committed, catching issues early

recommendations.recommendation: Add CONTRIBUTING.md documenting the linting and formatting requirements
recommendations.rationale: New contributors will understand the code quality standards and how to run formatters/linters

recommendations.recommendation: Add npm scripts for lint, lint:fix, and format commands in package.json
recommendations.rationale: Makes it easy for developers to check and fix code style issues

recommendations.recommendation: Integrate ESLint and Prettier checks into CI pipeline to enforce on all PRs
recommendations.rationale: Ensures code quality standards are maintained across all contributed code

recommendations.recommendation: Document recommended IDE extensions (ESLint, Prettier, EditorConfig plugins)
recommendations.rationale: Provides real-time feedback to developers during development, not just at commit/CI time

recommendations.recommendation: Verify tsconfig.json is properly configured and the 'project' path in ESLint parserOptions is correct
recommendations.rationale: Type-checking rules in ESLint depend on proper TypeScript configuration
